name: duplicon_995pct_300kb
description: Two-copy duplicon of 300000 bp at 99.5% pairwise identity (1 mismatch every 200 bp on average). Models recent segmental duplications (e.g. SMN1/SMN2, NF1/NF1P). Stresses paralog-specific variant (PSV) disambiguation: paralogous k-mers dominate index.
sources: synthetic, designed as mapper stress test — no biological source
